name: ideas
description: Turn a raw idea into an audited design spec, a canonical implementation plan, and optionally agent-ready GitHub issues.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into audited build plans
interface.longDescription: Run a scope-sized, ledger-backed interview; produce an audited design spec with EARS acceptance criteria; turn it into a canonical implementation plan; and optionally project ready tasks to GitHub issues.
defaultPrompt: Interview me to turn this rough idea into a spec.
Turn an approved design spec into an implementation plan.
Project this Ideas plan into GitHub tickets.
